title: Ash Ships
description: Generates ships sailing across your Minecraft oceans!
body:
[![AshCraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a75887d69106ed9eb2dd595176121f279523f184_0.webp)](https://www.ashcraft.cz/)

The AshShips Datapack enhances Minecraft’s oceans by generating detailed ship structures across the water, making the seas feel more alive and immersive. Whether you're exploring the open ocean, building a port city, or just looking for maritime inspiration, this datapack adds realistic vessels to your world.

🚢 Features:

✔ Randomly Generated Ships – Boats and ships naturally spawn in ocean biomes.
✔ Currently Includes ships, that you can see in gallery – More ships will be added in future updates!
✔ Static Structures – Ships are not moving but serve as detailed landmarks.

🌊 Spawn Mechanics:

The yacht and warship spawn randomly in ocean biomes as a natural part of world generation.
More ship types will be introduced in future updates.
Works in singleplayer and multiplayer without issues.

⚙️ How to Install:

Open your Minecraft world folder (.minecraft/saves/Your_World_Name).
Place the datapack file into the datapacks folder inside your world folder.
Launch Minecraft and enter your world.
Type /reload (if already in the world) to activate the datapack.

That’s it! Now enjoy discovering realistic yachts and ships across your Minecraft oceans! More vessels coming soon! ⛵🚢🌊

💬 Got ideas for new ship? Join my [Discord](https://discord.ashcraft.cz/) and let me know what I should add next!
